heading: Specify Compression Algorithms
body:
You can enable compression for the connection to your MongoDB instance
by specifying the algorithms in one of two ways:

- Adding the parameter to your connection string.

- Specifying the `compressors` option in your `MongoClientOptions`.

Connection String

MongoClientOptions

Specify compression algorithms using the following strings:

- "snappy" for [Snappy](https://google.github.io/snappy/) compression

- "zlib" for [Zlib](https://zlib.net/) compression

- "zstd" for [Zstandard](https://github.com/facebook/zstd/) compression
